new_jobs.title: IT & Network Technician - Kabul
new_jobs.description:
About Ariyabod ISP
Ariyabod is a leading and experienced Internet Service Provider (ISP) based in Afghanistan, with nationwide operational experience since 2020. Over the years, the company has successfully delivered reliable internet connectivity and IT solutions across the country, serving government institutions, private enterprises, non-governmental organizations (NGOs), educational institutions, and residential customers.
The company is supported by a team of highly qualified technical and administrative professionals who are committed to delivering innovative, reliable, and customer-focused solutions. Ariyabod's success is built on the quality of its services, operational excellence, and a strong commitment to customer satisfaction.
Ariyabod provides a comprehensive range of services for homes, businesses, and organizations of all sizes. These services include high-speed internet connectivity, enterprise networking solutions, IT infrastructure deployment, managed network services, wireless communications, and technical support designed to meet the evolving needs of its customers.
The company's vision is to remain one of Afghanistan's most trusted technology partners while becoming one of the country's leading providers of internet and IT infrastructure solutions. Ariyabod is committed to continuous innovation, adopting modern technologies, and maintaining the highest standards of service quality.
In today's rapidly evolving telecommunications industry, Ariyabod consistently strives to do the right thing by providing secure, reliable, and high-performance internet services backed by responsive customer support and expert technical assistance. Through professionalism, integrity, and continuous improvement, the company aims to contribute to Afghanistan's digital transformation and economic development.

Job Descriptions
Job Summary
Ariyabod ISP is looking for a reliable and experienced IT Technician and Network Engineer to join our team. The successful candidate is responsible for providing technical support to customers regarding Internet services, troubleshooting and resolving customer complaints, and installing and supporting internet services. This position requires excellent technical skills, customer service skills, as well as the ability to work independently and with a team.
Ariyabod ISP is seeking a reliable, experienced, and highly motivated IT Technician & Network Engineer to join our growing team. The successful candidate will be responsible for providing technical support to customers, installing and maintaining internet services, troubleshooting network and connectivity issues, and ensuring the delivery of high-quality technical services.
This role requires strong technical expertise in networking and IT systems, excellent problem-solving abilities, outstanding customer service skills, and the ability to work both independently and collaboratively within a team environment.
Key Responsibilities
Provide technical support and assistance to customers regarding internet and network services.
Install, configure, and maintain internet connectivity for residential and business customers.
Diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve network, hardware, and software issues.
Respond promptly to customer complaints and technical incidents, ensuring timely resolution.
Configure and maintain routers, switches, wireless access points, and other networking equipment.
Monitor network performance and identify potential issues before they impact customers.
Perform preventive maintenance and routine inspections of network infrastructure.
Document technical issues, service requests, and solutions accurately.
Collaborate with the Network Operations Center (NOC) and other technical teams to resolve complex problems.
Ensure compliance with company policies, technical standards, and safety procedures.
Provide on-site technical support and maintenance when required.
Participate in network upgrades, expansions, and infrastructure improvement projects.
Required Qualifications
Bachelor's degree or diploma in Information Technology, Computer Science, Telecommunications, or a related field.
Minimum of 2 years of experience in networking, ISP operations, or technical support (preferred).
Strong knowledge of TCP/IP, LAN/WAN, Wireless Networks, Routing, and Switching.
Experience with MikroTik, Cisco, Ubiquiti, or similar networking equipment.
Familiarity with fiber optic and wireless internet technologies is an advantage.
Knowledge of Windows and Linux operating systems is desirable.
Excellent troubleshooting and analytical skills.
Strong communication and customer service abilities.
Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks effectively.
Willingness to travel to customer sites when necessary.

Job Requirements
Job Requirement
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Information and Communication Technology (ICT), Network Engineering, or a related field from a recognized university.
Demonstrated technical expertise in the installation, configuration, maintenance, and troubleshooting of internet services and network infrastructure.
Holder of a MikroTik Certified Network Associate (MTCNA) certification or possessing equivalent practical skills.
Solid understanding of CompTIA Network+ concepts and networking fundamentals.
Knowledge of Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA) technologies is considered a strong advantage.
Strong understanding of TCP/IP, LAN/WAN, routing, switching, wireless networking, and network security principles.
Excellent troubleshooting, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
Outstanding customer service and interpersonal communication skills.
Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively within a team environment.
Ability to prioritize tasks, work under pressure, and meet deadlines.
Willingness to travel to customer locations and provide on-site technical support when required.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified candidates are invited to submit their CV along with a cover letter (letter of interest) to jobs@ariyabod.af .
Email Subject: IT & Network Technician #47-Kabul- Technician
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted and invited for an interview.

Submission Email
jobs@ariyabod.af.
Apply

details.Contract Duration: 1 year with the possibility of extension

new_jobs.title: Call for CVs – Multiple TCN Positions
new_jobs.category: OPERATIONS, Operations, Security, Operation, Information Technology, Procurement and logistics
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
Global Star Security Services Company (GSS) is inviting applications from qualified Third-Country National (TCN)
professionals to join our team in Afghanistan.
Available
Positions:
· Armourer
· Explosive Detection Dog
(EDD) K9 Handler
· EDD K9 Supervisor
· IT Specialist
· Logistics Manager
Job
Summary: Successful candidates will support GSS operations by ensuring
the highest standards of safety, compliance, and professionalism. Roles include
maintaining and repairing firearms, conducting explosives detection with
trained dogs, supervising K9 operations, managing IT infrastructure and
cybersecurity, and overseeing logistics, procurement, and fleet management.
Each position requires proven expertise, discipline, and the ability to work
effectively in a multinational environment under challenging conditions.

Duties and Responsibilities
01) Armourer
Duties & Responsibilities
Inspect, clean, service, and repair firearms and weapon systems.
Diagnose faults, conduct authorised repairs, and test weapons for safety.
Withdraw defective firearms from service and ensure secure storage.
Support training on safe handling and maintenance of weapons.
Advise management on procurement and suitability of firearms.
Maintain accurate records of inspections, repairs, and weapon movements.
Report losses, discrepancies, or safety concerns immediately.
Qualifications & Experience
Minimum 5 years of firearm maintenance/repair experience.
Recognised qualification as Weapon Artificer/Armourer (Grade 3 or equivalent).
Diploma or technical certification in small arms maintenance (advantage).
Strong knowledge of firearms safety, accountability, and secure storage.
Ability to diagnose faults and perform authorised repairs.
Competence in recordkeeping and computer-based tracking systems.
Willingness to travel to project sites.
Required Documentation
Updated CV
National ID/Passport
Armourer/Weapon Artificer qualifications
Relevant training certificates
Two professional references
02) EDD K9 Handler
Duties & Responsibilities
Deploy with trained dogs to detect explosives at entry points and security sites.
Conduct searches of vehicles, baggage, parcels, compounds, and facilities.
Ensure dog welfare through daily checks, feeding, grooming, and exercise.
Participate in refresher and continuation training.
Maintain kennels, posts, and K9 equipment hygienically.
Record daily operational activities and prepare reports.
Report positive indications, suspicious items, or incidents promptly.
Qualifications & Experience
Recognised EDD K9 Handler certification (preferred).
Minimum 1 year of security industry experience.
Prior EDD handling experience with military/police/security organisations (advantage).
Experience working with dogs or animals (preferred).
Good understanding of explosives-detection procedures.
Good English communication and reporting skills.
Basic computer knowledge (advantage).
Valid passport and physical fitness.
Required Documentation
Updated CV
Valid passport
EDD K9 Handler certification (if available)
Security/K9 training certificates
Employment/experience certificates
Recent passport-size photo
Two professional references
03) EDD K9 Supervisor
Duties & Responsibilities
Supervise K9 handlers and daily operations.
Monitor dog health, welfare, feeding, grooming, and housing.
Coordinate veterinary support and logistical needs.
Oversee kennel hygiene and operational readiness.
Provide refresher and remedial training for handlers and dogs.
Conduct site visits, inspections, and performance assessments.
Prepare operational reports and attend management/client meetings.
Ensure compliance with SOPs, contracts, and legal requirements.
Qualifications & Experience
Minimum 5 years of experience with Explosive Detection Dogs.
Recognised qualification in EDD handling, K9 training, or kennel management.
Supervisory experience managing K9 handlers and operational teams.
Strong knowledge of welfare, training, and operational requirements.
Experience in kennel management and hygiene standards.
Excellent English communication and reporting skills.
Proficiency in computer systems for reporting.
Willingness to travel to project sites.
Required Documentation
Updated CV
Valid passport
EDD/K9 training and kennel-management qualifications
Employment/training certificates
Two professional references
04) IT Specialist
Duties & Responsibilities
Monitor and maintain IT infrastructure (computers, servers, networks).
Install, configure, and update hardware/software.
Diagnose and resolve technical issues.
Manage user accounts, permissions, and databases.
Implement backups, disaster recovery, and cybersecurity measures.
Protect company data against breaches and malware.
Maintain IT asset inventory and coordinate with vendors.
Train employees on secure IT practices and provide technical support.
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree/diploma in IT, Computer Science, Cybersecurity, or related field.
Minimum 5 years of professional IT experience.
Experience supporting hardware, software, networks, and users.
Proficiency in Microsoft Windows, Office, and business applications.
Knowledge of network administration, routers, switches, wireless systems.
Understanding of cybersecurity practices (antivirus, firewalls, access controls).
Preferred certifications: CompTIA A+/Network+/Security+, Microsoft, Cisco CCNA, ITIL.
Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.
Good English communication skills.
Valid passport for deployment.
Required Documentation
Updated CV
Valid passport
Academic/professional IT qualifications
Technical certifications
Employment/experience certificates
Recent passport-size photo
Two professional references
05) Logistics Manager
Duties & Responsibilities
Manage logistics for HQ and project sites (equipment, transport, facilities).
Develop and improve logistics policies, procedures, and systems.
Oversee procurement, supplier evaluation, and subcontractor management.
Manage accommodation, catering, hygiene, and facility maintenance.
Control uniforms, PPE, and operational equipment inventory.
Support armoury and controlled equipment management.
Oversee vehicle fleet operations (allocation, maintenance, fuel control).
Supervise drivers and ensure operational readiness.
Ensure compliance with Afghan law, GSS policies, and contracts.
Qualifications & Experience
Extensive experience in logistics management within multinational/security organisations.
Proven ability in procurement, supplier/subcontractor management, and fleet operations.
Knowledge of Afghan laws, regulations, and compliance requirements.
Experience managing accommodation, catering, hygiene, and facilities.
Strong organisational, supervisory, and record-keeping skills.
Excellent English communication skills.
Valid passport and willingness to live/work in Afghanistan.
Required Documentation
Updated CV
Valid passport
Relevant logistics/management qualifications
Employment/experience certificates

Job Requirements
Collective Qualifications (General Requirements Across All Roles)
Relevant professional qualifications or certifications in the respective field.
Proven work experience (minimum 1–5 years depending on the role).
Strong technical knowledge and practical skills related to the position.
Good understanding of safety, compliance, and operational procedures.
Strong integrity, discipline, and accountability.
Good written and spoken English communication skills.
Ability to work effectively in a multinational environment.
Physical fitness and willingness to live and work in Afghanistan.
Valid passport with sufficient validity for deployment and visa processing.
Computer literacy and record‑keeping skills (advantage for all roles).
Collective Required Documentation (For All Applicants)
Updated Curriculum Vitae (CV).
Copy of valid passport or national ID.
Copies of relevant academic, professional, and technical qualifications.
Copies of training certificates (where applicable).
Copies of employment/experience certificates.
Recent passport‑size photograph.
Contact details of at least two professional references.

Submission Guidelines
International interested and qualified candidates are strongly encouraged to apply before the stated deadline.
Given the urgency of ensuring the regular progress of company missions, Global Star Security Services (GSS) has decided to conduct this recruitment on a rolling basis. Accordingly, GSS reserves the right to conclude the recruitment process once suitable qualified candidates have been identified.
If you believe you are among the most qualified applicants for this role, we kindly urge you not to delay and to submit your application at the earliest opportunity.

details.Functional Area: OPERATIONS, Operations, Security, Operation, Information Technology, Procurement and logistics

expiring_today.title: Academic Administrator – Computer Science
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
Are you a passionate, energetic and a result-oriented individual with strong managerial skills and solid knowledge? If yes, this opportunity is for you. Kardan University is seeking experienced and motivated Academic Administrators for the Departments of Data Science and Information Technology.
We offer an exciting work environment conducive to academic and professional development of our people. Kardan University offers a competitive salary in the higher education industry.

Duties and Responsibilities
Sharing academic administrative activities with department faculty and staff and ensure that all university and faculty relevant policies and procedures are being practiced in a streamline fashion.
Plan new student’s entry process including; preparation of the entry test paper, arrange candidate’s interview, prepare and conduct orientation for new students and prepare class schedules for both new and existing students.
Disseminate schedules to the students and the faculty members in timely manner
Plan and arrange the examinations as per the academic calendar and ensure to conduct examination in an organized manner.
Orient the departmental policies and procedures to the new faculty members and staff, provide Management Information System (MIS) tutorials, and orient the role(s) they are expected to fulfill in the context of the department's educational objectives.
Ensuring that the Faculty and University deadlines are met for the course selection, uploading of the exam results in the MIS system and submission of the examination reports to the secrecy.
Ensuring that all faculty members complete their respective course outlines within the semester’s timeframe.
Closely supervise the examination and evaluation process and ensure the transparency and accuracy of the student’s internal and external assessments.
Ensuring that students are properly advised.
Supervise the staff and student relations within the department, and when necessary, participation in the resolution of grievances and disciplinary problems.
Resolve student’s quires on timely manner.
Ensure to transparently conduct and report lecturer evaluation to the program dean by the end of each semester.
Plan new faculty induction prior to the start of the new semester and ensure to arrange the required resources.
Act as a point of contact for the full-time faculty, visiting lecturers, staff and students, dealing with enquiries and providing support.
Establish, maintain and use clear and effective means of communication with the faculty, staff and students.
Ensure that copies of all forms are up to date and appropriately stocked for use by students and/or staff.
Coordinate with the University’s communication office in telling the departmental success stories.

Job Requirements
PhD/Master (Computer Science) with at least 3 years of teaching and administrative experience at an institution of higher education.
Strong organizational, management, interpersonal and communication skills.
Ability to teach in English Language and command on any national language.
Degree must be attested by the Ministry of Higher Education of Afghanistan.
At least 80% Master Degree Marks or B grade in case of foreign degree.
At least 75% Bachelor Degree Marks or B grade in case of foreign degree.
The Bachelor’s, Master’s, and PhD degrees must demonstrate above 60% field consistency (Degree Relevance).

Submission Guidelines
Qualified candidates should submit their resume and cover letter (both in one document) via email to jobs@kardan.edu.af . Email applications must include the position title in the email subject line.
We thank all the applicants for their interest; however, only the shortlisted candidates will be contacted for a demo/test.
Email / Application Form: jobs@kardan.edu.af

expiring_today.title: Network Security Contractual employee
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
The Network Security Engineer is responsible for protecting and strengthening the organization’s ISP and enterprise network infrastructure with a primary focus on network-level security architecture, routing, and switching environments. This role ensures the secure design, deployment, and operation of core and edge network systems, including firewalls, VPN gateways, routing platforms, and switching infrastructure.
The engineer will work with multi-vendor network security technologies such as Juniper SRX, Huawei, Sophos, and other enterprise security platforms, ensuring secure connectivity, traffic control, and threat prevention across backbone, access, and corporate networks. The role requires strong expertise in network protocols, traffic analysis, and secure network design to support highly available and resilient telecom environments.

Duties and Responsibilities
Design, implement, and maintain network-level security controls across core, distribution, and access layers.
Secure routing and switching infrastructure including BGP, OSPF, MPLS, and VLAN environments.
Configure and manage firewalls, IPS/IDS, and VPN gateways across multi-vendor platforms.
Implement and maintain network segmentation, VRF, VLAN architecture, and secure traffic isolation.
Apply and manage NAT, ACLs, port security, control-plane protection, and secure device management (SSH, AAA, TACACS+/RADIUS).
Support secure integration between ISP backbone, data centers, and enterprise networks.
Network Monitoring & Threat Detection
Monitor network traffic, flows, and logs to detect anomalies, attacks, and performance issues.
Analyze traffic patterns using network monitoring and security tools.
Identify and mitigate DDoS attacks, routing anomalies, and network-based threats.
Collaborate with NOC and security teams to maintain network availability and security posture.
Incident Response & Vulnerability Management
Investigate network security incidents and perform root cause analysis.
Respond to security events affecting routing, switching, and firewall infrastructure.
Conduct network vulnerability assessments and implement remediation measures.
Ensure secure configuration baselines across all network devices.
Policy Enforcement & Compliance
Enforce network security policies, standards, and hardening guidelines.
Ensure compliance with organizational and regulatory security requirements.
Implement secure access control for internal, external, and partner connectivity.
Documentation & Continuous Improvement
Maintain up-to-date network topology diagrams, security architecture documentation, and configuration standards.
Document incidents, mitigation strategies, and lessons learned.
Stay updated on emerging network threats, vulnerabilities, and telecom security practices.

Job Requirements
· Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, Cybersecurity, or a related field.
Certification:
Required: CCNA, CompTIA Security+ (or equivalent)
Preferred: CEH, CCNP Security, JNCIS-SEC, or vendor-specific firewall certifications
Experience:
Minimum of three (3) years of hands-on experience in Network Security Engineering or Network Engineering, preferably within telecommunications or ISP environments.
Technical Skills
Strong knowledge of routing and switching technologies (BGP, OSPF, MPLS, VLANs, STP).
Hands-on experience with Juniper SRX, Huawei, Sophos, or similar enterprise firewalls.
Experience implementing VPN technologies (IPsec, SSL VPN, site-to-site).
Deep understanding of network protocols, traffic flow analysis, and network security controls.
Experience with network monitoring, log analysis, and threat detection tools

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (NSCE-003) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

expiring_today.title: کارمند مدیریت پلان و تعقیب امور فایبر نوری - (Re - Announced)
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
کارمند بست متذکره مسؤل پلان، گزارش دهی، هماهنگی، تعقیب، نظارت و با استفاده از شبکه OPGW و کرایه پایه های ولتاژ متوسط و پایین د افغانستان برشنا شرکت به سطحه منطقه،‌ کشور،‌ ولایات، و شهرها می باشد

Duties and Responsibilities
پلان و طرح ریزی فعالیت ‌های تجارتی و عایداتی زیربنای شبکه OPGW و کرایه دهی پایه‌ های ولتاژ متوسط و پایین د افغانستان برشنا شرکت
ایجاد و طراحی مادل های تجارتی جهت استفاده از پایه های برق (ولتاژ متوسط و ولتاژ پاین) به منظور استقرار فایبر نوری توسط شرکت برشنا و یا هر نهاد دیگری که تقاضا مینمایند
نظارت و گزارش دهی بر شبکه OPGW و دیگر کیبل های فایبر نوری با هماهنگی واحد های ذیدخل، و فعالیت ها در شبکه کیبل فایبر نوری بر اساس توافقنامه ها و تفاهم نامه ها در داخل د افغانستان برشنا شرکت و با سایر نهادها
بررسی، مطالعه و تحلیل ساحوی جهت تهیه طرح و پلان در رابطه به زیربنای شبکه OPGW و پایه های ولتاژ متوسط و پاین د افغانستان برشنا شرکت
هماهنگی با ریاست عملیاتی و ریاست پروژه ها جهت در نظر گرفتن توسعه شبکه OPGW به اساس لزوم دید تقاضا، بلند بردن خدمات و عواید

Job Requirements
حد اقل داشتن سند لیسانس و یا ماستری در رشته تکنالوژی معلوماتی و یا کمپیوترساینس
داشتن حد اقل سه سال تجربه کاری در بخش مربوطه
مهارت مکالمه بطور شفاهی و کتبی
داشتن قوه ابتکار، خلاقیت و مدیریت کاری
توانایی تکلم با زبان های ملی و انگلیسی
حس مسؤلیت پذیری و جوابدهی
دقت کاری و داشتن دانش قانون کار
ابتکار کاری و سرعت کار در گزارش گیری و گزارش دهی
صداقت و حفظ محرمیت کاری
انعطاف پذیری و تعین اولویت بندی کاری در شرایط دشوار
توانایی کار بشکل گروهی و فردی

Submission Guidelines
Dear Applicant,
Thank you for your interest in applying for the job, The qualified and interested applicants can fill the online application form through the following link:
Link for online Apply
http://hris.dabs.af/Recruit/Applicant/ApplicantApply/95ECA719-CB59-40DE-870B-4C7016847B92
To ensure that your application is considered, please follow these submission guidelines:
1. Submit your application by the deadline specified as late applications will not be considered.
2. Fill out the application form completely and accordingly as incomplete form will not be considered. Make sure to provide all the necessary information, including your personal details, work experience, education and skills.
3. Provide accurate contact information as this will be used for all communications regarding your application.
4. Double-check your applications before submitting it to ensure that these are no errors or omissions.
5. Shortlisted candidates will be directly contacted for a written test or interview. If you’re not contacted within two or four weeks after the closing date, please know that your application has not been considered for the post.
Note: The internal employees of DABS are required to get the approval of their respective head of division and submit it along with application form, otherwise the application will be rejected.
We appreciate your interest in DABS and look forward to reviewing your application, if you have any questions contact us on this phone number:
Contact Number: 0202513694

expiring_soon.title: Full-Stack Web Developer (Night Shift)
expiring_soon.salary: As per HPL salary scale (negotiable based on experience)
expiring_soon.description:
About HPL Afghanistan
HPL is an Afghan company providing services and operational support to international organizations and private clients. Our technology team builds and maintains modern web applications and data platforms that support our operations across the organization.

Job Descriptions
HPL is hiring experienced Full-Stack Web Developers to design, build, and maintain modern web applications and data platforms that support our international operations. This is a night shift position, scheduled to overlap with US time zone business hours. We are looking for engineers with more than 5 years of professional experience who take ownership of features from start to finish, write clean and tested code, and collaborate well within a small, fast moving team.
Key Responsibilities:
Build and maintain web applications with React, Next.js, and TypeScript
Develop backend services and REST APIs with Node.js and Python
Design, query, and optimize PostgreSQL databases
Integrate third party APIs and build data pipelines
Deploy and maintain applications on cloud platforms such as Vercel or AWS
Write clean, well documented, and tested code, and take part in code reviews
Use Git for version control and collaborate within the team

Job Requirements
Required Qualifications:
More than 5 years of professional full stack web development experience
Bachelor degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
Strong proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript
Experience with React, Node.js, and Python
Working knowledge of SQL and PostgreSQL
Proficiency with Git and collaborative workflows
Good written and spoken English
Available to work the night shift
Preferred Skills:
Next.js (App Router) and server side rendering
Cloud experience with Vercel or AWS
Search engines such as Typesense or Elasticsearch
Docker, CI/CD, and automated testing

Submission Guidelines
To apply, please complete the HPL Job Application Form: HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM
Important Notes:
Clearly state your current address and the job location you are applying for in both your CV and the application form. Applications missing this information will not be accepted.
Applications received after the closing date will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
HPL does not charge any fee at any stage of the recruitment process. Applying is completely free.
Only the HR department will contact applicants. HPL is not responsible for announcements on other websites or social media; only information shared through official HPL channels is valid.
For any issues during the application process, please contact us at www.hpl.af/contacts.

Submission Email
see above
Apply

details.Salary: As per HPL salary scale (negotiable based on experience)
details.Contract Duration: One year, extendable based on performance
details.Education: Bachelor degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field

expiring_soon.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (.NET / React)
expiring_soon.description:
About Nasry Tech LLC
NasryTech is a US-based software company (registered in Washington State) building a modern construction
management platform that helps contractors manage leads, estimates, projects, communications, documents,
invoicing, and payments — all from one platform. We are an early-stage, founder-led startup building scalable,
user-friendly software for contractors and construction businesses.
Website: www.nasrytech.com

Job Description
Engagement Type: Independent Contractor · Fully Remote · Long-term
About the Role
We are seeking a Senior Full-Stack Developer to join our remote engineering team as an early technical hire.
You will build features end-to-end — from database to user interface — help shape the architecture of our
platform, and guide a small team of developers as we grow. This is a long-term, fully remote, independent
contractor engagement with real ownership of your work and the stability of an ongoing role.
The position is home-based and open to applicants worldwide.
What We Offer
• Competitive pay and a stable, long-term engagement.
• Fully remote work.
• Direct collaboration with the founder and genuine ownership of your work.
• The chance to grow with an early-stage product and shape its architecture.

Job Requirements
Duties & Responsibilities
• Design, build, and maintain features across the full stack, from database to UI.
• Develop secure, scalable backend APIs and services in C# / .NET, following Clean Architecture principles
(CQRS, dependency injection, domain-driven design).
• Build responsive, high-quality web applications using React and TypeScript.
• Apply engineering best practices: clean code, testing, and sustainable system design.
• Work closely with the founder and team to plan, prioritize, and deliver features.
• Lead and mentor a small team of developers — providing technical guidance, reviewing code, and helping
the team deliver high-quality software.
Required Qualifications (Must Have)
• 5+ years of professional full-stack development, building and deploying production applications.
• Strong expertise in C# and the .NET ecosystem, including Clean Architecture patterns (CQRS, dependency
injection, DDD).
• Strong experience with React and TypeScript, and a willingness to work across other technologies as
needed.
• Skilled with AI coding tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude) to work efficiently — while reviewing,
testing, and taking full responsibility for all code.
• Strong written and spoken English for clear, proactive remote communication.
• Able to work independently, manage priorities, and deliver reliably in a remote setup.
Preferred (Nice to Have)
• Experience leading or mentoring a small development team.
• Experience integrating AI features into products (LLM APIs such as OpenAI or Anthropic, smart search,
chat assistants, automation).
• React Native / mobile development.
• Cloud and Infrastructure as Code (AWS, Terraform, serverless).
• SQL databases, payments integration (e.g., Stripe), and CI/CD.
• Previous SaaS or startup experience with America base companies.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified applicants are encouraged to send their CV with a short cover note, a link to their GitHub or portfolio,
and a link to one C# / React project they have worked on (with one or two sentences describing their role).
Please also include in your email:
• Your country and time zone
•Your expected pay rate in USD
Please clearly indicate the position name and vacancy number — “Senior Full-Stack Developer / NT-ENG-001”
— in the email subject line. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications are reviewed on a
rolling basis.
Applications should be sent by email to: careers@nasrytech.com

expiring_soon.description:
About Hindukush Bridge ICT-Services Company
HKB-ICT is a leading internet and communication company aiming to make Afghanistan go online in ten coming years.
Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company is a Kabul-based company specializing in providing internet services to NOGs, Government, local offices, and Home Users in Afghanistan. This company is 100% Afghan-owned and a team of highly qualified professionals having over a decade of experience in the various areas of ISP and ICT sector with different national and international organizations manages its operations.
Hindukush Bridge has a great partnership with most of the main players in the satellite and telecom industry. We are offering many added-value services to our partner/customer all over Afghanistan, along with a 24/7 hours Network Operation Center.
Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company functioning under a valid License Number (66724) issued by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry by the name of Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company the Company has professional and technical staff in various fields such as surveying, analyzing, budget estimation, project management, reporting and documentation, data-related issues.

Job Descriptions
Working with HKB-ICT requires full sort of work experience, strong interpersonal skills, good orientation towards working with people in group or lonely, strong intentions to work and grow, able to under loads and be task oriented.
The postholder will lead the development of our portfolio in Afghanistan, including identifying future business development opportunities and overseeing the writing of new project proposals. The post holder will ensure effective office management so that all functions are carried out in line with organization rules, local regulatory requirements and HKB-ICT guidelines.
Generally, applicants need to earn at least three years of professional experience in the fields of installation, troubleshoots, alignment and other information technology related area within the relevant scope of business.
You must be able to form and cultivate effective relationships huge range of customer at all levels, which will be considered as key to your success. You should be able to manage effective teamwork.
You must also have strong presentation, negotiation, and communication skills, be able to make decisions concerning IT goral and be able to manage multiple priorities simultaneously. Managers in this industry should have strong technical skills. Some courses you may take for a degree program related to IT technical clerk include the following:
Information Technology
Networking

A compassionate and Transmission Officer, you’ll need to bring substantial experience in the management, interpersonal skills, motivation to work under various circumstances and develop new customers for the organization as per the guidelines provided by the senior executives.
This remains highly important that you should be able to manage large-scale of work and load, face different challenges and work complexities, with strong and proven quality to deliver high-quality representation of the company to the society within the deadline and budget.
Beyond these critical, core areas of skills and experience, you will also have to:
KEY COMPETEN
CIES AND REQUIREMENTS
Good Customer Service Skill
Excellent Communication Skill
Verbal and Written Skills

Excellent Technical Skill in IT Network Routing and Switching (CCNA, MCP, MTCNA, Huawei RTN)

DUTIES AND RESPONSIBLITIES

know all troubleshooting procedure and IP related commands

expiring_soon.title: Unix/Linux System Administrator
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
The Unix/Linux System Administrator is responsible for the installation, configuration, administration, maintenance, security, and performance of Unix/Linux operating systems and supporting infrastructure. The role ensures the availability, reliability, and security of enterprise systems that host critical business applications and databases. The administrator also provides technical support, automates routine tasks, monitors system health, and participates in disaster recovery and capacity planning.

Duties and Responsibilities
Install, configure, upgrade, and maintain Unix/Linux operating systems (Red Hat Enterprise Linux, CentOS, Oracle Linux, Ubuntu etc.).
Administer physical and virtual Linux servers.
Perform regular system patching and OS upgrades.
Manage system start-up, shutdown, and service configuration.
Configure and maintain kernel parameters and system tuning.
Deploy, configure, and maintain enterprise server infrastructure.
Manage file systems, storage allocation, and disk management.
Monitor server health and ensure optimal performance.
Maintain hardware inventory and server documentation.
Create, modify, and manage user accounts and groups.
Implement security hardening based on organizational standards.
Manage SSH access, Sudo privileges, and password policies.
Perform vulnerability remediation and security updates.
Monitor security logs and investigate suspicious activities.
Monitor CPU, memory, disk, and network utilization.
Perform capacity planning and resource forecasting.
Tune operating system parameters for optimal performance.
Backup & Disaster Recovery
Configure and monitor backup processes.
Verify backup integrity through regular restoration testing.
Participate in disaster recovery planning and execution.
Maintain business continuity procedures.
Automation & Scripting
Develop automation scripts using Shell, Python, or Perl.
Automate routine administrative tasks.
Maintain scheduled jobs using Cron and system timers.
Improve operational efficiency through scripting.
Network Administration Support
Configure network interfaces, routing, DNS, and firewall settings.
Troubleshoot network connectivity issues.
Support load balancing and high availability environments.
Assist with VPN and secure remote access configuration.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology, Information Systems, Software Engineering, or a related field.
Minimum 3–5 years of hands-on experience in Unix/Linux system administration within an enterprise environment.
Proven experience installing, configuring, upgrading, and maintaining Linux operating systems (Oracle Linux, Ubuntu).
Experience administering physical, virtual, and cloud-based Linux servers.
Strong experience with shell scripting (Bash) and automation of routine administrative tasks.
Well, understanding of Red Hat System Administrator.
Well, understanding Red Hat Engineer.
Oracle Linux Implementation Specialist (preferred)
VMware Professional (VCP) (preferred)
Configuration and communication between two servers (any OS)
Great knowledge of operating system.
Experience managing users, groups, permissions, authentication services (LDAP/Active Directory), and security policies.
Hands-on experience with system monitoring, performance tuning, troubleshooting, and capacity planning.
Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform) is an advantage.
Experience supporting enterprise applications and databases on Linux platforms.
Strong understanding of TCP/IP networking, DNS, SSH, NFS, firewalls, and storage management (LVM, SAN/NAS).

Submission Guidelines
The interested candidates should fill and submit the APPLICATION FORM with complete and correct information. To have access to the APPLICATION FORM, please copy and paste the link into your Web Browser.
https://forms.gle/ujCZmsD6SAuPgETA9

expiring_soon.title: Datacom IP Engineer
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
Installing, configuring, operating and troubleshooting LAN, WAN

Duties and Responsibilities
· Installing, configuring, operating and troubleshooting LAN, WAN.
· Configuring routing protocols, like: RIP, EIGRP, OSPF, IS-IS, BGP.
· Knowledge of static/ default routing.
· Configuring MPLS, VRF, VPLS, VSI.
· Knowledge of VLAN, VLAN types and VLAN usage.
· Familiarity with STP, VTP, VTP Pruning, CDP, LLDP, PPP.
· Having familiarity with PPPOE and Hotspot setups.
· Having knowledge and experience of ISP and DPLC/lease networks.
· Having knowledge of DSL, FTTB and P2MP setups.
· Knowledge of Load balancing protocols, like: VRRP, HSRP, GLBP.
· Configuring Prefix-lists, Route-maps.
· Configuring NAT, PAT.
· Configuring QoS (Quality of Service) for traffic prioritization.
· Configuring and managing different series Switches/Routers of Cisco, Mikrotik, ZTE and Huawei.
· Prepare procedures and technical documentations for network troubleshooting and design.
· Upgrading IOS of different vendor nodes such as, Cisco, Huawei and ZTE routers and switches.
· Taking and restoring backup of nodes.
· Use monitoring tools (PRTG, Zabbix, Cacti, LibreNMS, Pingplotter, The Dude, Nagios, SolarWinds).
· Troubleshooting and fixing customers’ issues.
· Installing and configuring server for different purposes.
· Integrating all Backbone uplinks with the required capacity.
· Troubleshooting the network and network elements with a proper report.
· Security aspect, implement IPSec VPN configuration, GRE, DMVPN, port security.
· In-depth knowledge of Linux/Unix network platform and Firewall.
· Create runbooks and SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures).
· Document network diagrams and configurations.
· Apply security measures (ACLs, anti-spoofing, DDoS mitigation).
· Use tools like Wireshark , Ping , Traceroute , NetFlow , SNMP.
· Manage core and edge network devices.
· Design and deploy system architecture (servers, storage, OS).
· Install and configure operating systems (Linux, Windows Server).
· Apply updates, patches, and configuration changes.
· Implement and manage system-level security (firewalls, antivirus, access controls).
· Set up and manage virtual machines (VMware, Hyper-V, VMware ESXi).
· Install and configure server for different purposes/setups using Linux based OS, Like Linux,
· Support hybrid environments (on-prem + cloud)
· Automate tasks using scripts (Bash, PowerShell, Python).
· Set up server roles: DNS, DHCP, Active Directory, File/Print Services, Web Servers (IIS/Apache).
· Implement and test backup strategies (e.g. Veeam, Acronis, Windows Backup).
· Having knowledge of virtualization, RAID, SAN/NAS.
Desirable Attributes:
· Daily operation activities.
· Desirable Attributes:
· Daily operation activities.
· Daily health check of router/switches.
· Monitor latency, throughput, and IP availability.
· Configure and maintain Mikrotik, Cisco, ZTE and Huawei Routers/Switches.
· Maintain network management i.e. backup / restore.
· Daily monitor and troubleshoot of various routing protocols i.e. Interior Gateway (IGP) and Exterior Gateway (EGP) etc.
· Syslog analysis and alarm management.
· Monitor NMS syslog and troubleshoot the network entities according to syslog alarms.
· Generate various traffic and performance related reports.
· Troubleshooting the network and network elements.
Monitor IOS for critical networks and analysis for further isolation

Job Requirements
داشتن سند تحصیلی حد اقل لیسانس در یکی از رشته های ( کمپیوترساینس یا IT )
تجارب : داشتن ( ۱ ) سال تجربه کاری مرتبط به بست برای لیسانس، ( ۱ ) سال برای ماستر و ( ۱ ) سال برای دوکتورا
مهارت های دیگر :
· داشتن تسلط کامل به یکی از زبانهای رسمی ( پشتو یا دری ) واشنائی ( تحریر وتکلم ) با زبان انگلیسی
· داشتن مهارت در پروگرام های کمپیوتر (Ms. Office)

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (Data IP-W-001) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking Technical Officer - ATM & POS
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Technical Officer – ATM & POS is primarily responsible for the end-to-end support, maintenance, and troubleshooting of Afghan United Bank’s ATM and POS infrastructure. This includes managing hardware and software operations, ensuring uptime and functionality, and coordinating with vendors for deployment, upgrades, and issue resolution. The role is vital to maintaining the reliability and effectiveness of self-service and point-of-sale banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Resolve difficult situations and malfunction of ATMs/POS effectively by analyzing the situation and identifying potential solutions and ensuring a high level of customer satisfaction.
· Oversee technical testing and implementation of ATMs and POS.
· Maintain of all communicational and networking issues related to ATM/POS
· Mobile Money
· Provide first-level technical support for ATMs, POS terminals, Mobile Banking, Internet Banking, and E-Commerce Gateway services.
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Coordinate with the switch vendor and third-party service providers for system upgrades, configurations, and incident management.
· Support onboarding and technical setup of POS merchants and E-Commerce merchants, including configuration and testing.
· Assist in testing and implementation of new digital banking features, services, and systems.
· Maintain accurate logs and documentation of technical activities, incidents, and changes.
· Ensure timely follow-up and escalation of unresolved issues to appropriate teams or vendors.
· Collaborate with internal departments to resolve customer-facing technical issues and contribute to service improvement.
· Adhere to internal IT, cybersecurity, and compliance standards for all supported platforms.
Participate in business continuity and contingency support processes for digital systems.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, or a related technical field.
Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in ATM and/or POS maintenance and support, preferably in a banking or financial environment.
Strong knowledge of ATM and POS hardware components, software configurations, and troubleshooting.
Familiarity with ATM switch systems and integration protocols.
Understanding of network connectivity and remote management tools.
Ability to manage vendor coordination and service level monitoring.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number (AUB/EA/VA/026-029) in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates who have completed the requirements of the vacancy will be called for further selection process.

The post holder will ensure effective office management so that all functions are carried out in line with organization rules, local regulatory requirements and HKB-ICT guidelines.
The role of the Finance Officer involves providing financial and administrative support to colleagues, clients and stakeholders of the business. It’s a role that may attract applicants keen to move up the financial corporate ladder; those with ambitions of being Finance Managers, or even the CFO one day.
Finance Officer job description should highlight the need for candidates who are focused on outcomes, excellent problem solvers and strong communicators.

Conducting financial transactions: a Finance Officer oversees all financial transactions, including issuing payments, collecting debts, and investing money.
Ensuring compliance with financial regulations and laws: Finance Officers must comply with all relevant economic rules and regulations in Australia and overseas. This includes ensuring that financial records are accurate and up-to-date.
Using accounting software: this is to keep an accurate record of all internal and external business financial transactions and perform financial audits wherever necessary.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Deputy Network Manager
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Deputy Network Manager supports the Network Manager in planning, implementing, securing, and maintaining the organization’s network infrastructure. The role involves assisting in day-to-day operations, monitoring network performance, ensuring security, and providing technical support to branches. The Deputy Network Manager also acts as a backup to the Network Manager during absences and plays a key role in supervising and coordinating network-related activities across the organization.

Duties and Responsibilities
Support in Network Design & Specification – Assist the Network Manager in establishing network specifications by gathering user requirements, analyzing workflows, and reviewing access, information, and security needs.
Assist in Network Implementation – Support the evaluation of network performance (availability, utilization, throughput, and latency) and participate in equipment selection, installation, configuration, and testing under the guidance of the Network Manager.
Network Security Support – Help in monitoring and enforcing security policies, access controls, and firewall configurations while ensuring proper documentation is maintained.
User Support & Training – Provide user support, resolve technical issues, and assist in conducting training programs to improve user knowledge and efficiency.
System Upgrades & Vendor Coordination – Assist in coordinating with vendors, testing new solutions, and implementing system upgrades and enhancements.
Documentation & Standards – Maintain accurate records of network equipment, configurations, and procedures while supporting the development of IT and network standards.
Branch Network Support – Visit branches as required to assist with network monitoring, troubleshooting, and surveys under the direction of the Network Manager.
Critical Support – Provide backup support for critical incidents, ensuring 24/7 availability when required.
Inventory Management – Assist in managing network inventory, spare parts, and related documentation.
Confidentiality & Compliance – Ensure that sensitive information is protected and that policies and procedures are followed.
Deputy Role – Act as the Network Manager’s delegate during absences, ensuring smooth continuity of network operations.
Continuous Learning – Stay updated with the latest networking technologies and best practices to provide effective support.

Job Requirements
Minimum Education: Associated degree in an information technology related field.
Preferred Education: Master degree in an information technology related filed.
Preferred Certifications: CCNA, CCNP and CCIE (will be mostly preferred).
At least 4-5 years of experience of managing networks (preferably in banking industry).
Strong interpersonal and professional communication skills.
Ability to understand data and it's usage.
Possess good process management and problem solving skills.
Ability to work in a team with a hands-on approach for tasks and should also be able to work independently.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number AUB/EA/VA/026-032 in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.

tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.
Requires quick work execution, competent English skills, honesty and reliability, and extensive knowledge or connections in Baghlan Province.

Duties and Responsibilities
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.

Job Requirements
Residing in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan; possessing basic English writing and communication skills; preference will be given to candidates with relevant government, military, or investigator experience; male candidates preferred

Submission Guidelines
Please submit your English resume on this website. Name your resume with your name and occupation. The resume should include your phone number, education, and detailed work experience (specifying position, company name, and responsibilities). Please update your resume regularly. Company staff will contact you via email; please check your inbox.
